contentComparison.note: CPT block — no frontend URL, no HTML comparison applicable. Code review performed on source files.
contentComparison.reason: First QA run — no previous snapshot to compare against

build.notes: bun run build compiles without errors. TestimonialCPT block files compile cleanly.

lint.notes: 1 lint warning in TestimonialCPT.tsx. Lint errors exist in OTHER blocks (FullWidthMedia, MainWrapper, TestimonialsCarousel) — pre-existing, not introduced by this block.

warningsInBlock.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'editPost'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.
warningsInBlock.notes: editPost from useDispatch is stable in practice (dispatch functions don't change identity), but the ESLint rule requires it be listed. Fix: add editPost to the dependency array or wrap in useCallback.

attributes.notes: block.json attributes: {} — correct for CPT block. All data stored as post meta.

fieldsVerified.writeValue: This is an outstanding product that transformed our workflow.
fieldsVerified.readBack: This is an outstanding product that transformed our workflow.

fieldsVerified.notes: Integer type registered correctly. Writes 0 when no file selected.

metaPersistence.notes: All 5 meta fields (name, message, videoSource, videoFile, videoId) are registered with show_in_rest: true via theme_register_post_type_meta helper. Values persist correctly across saves.

templateLock.notes: inc/post-types/testimonial.php has template: [['takt/testimonial-cpt']] and template_lock: 'all'. Block is pre-inserted via template on all new Testimonial posts. Template lock 'all' prevents adding, removing, or moving blocks.

details.explanation: Empty raw content is expected — the block is injected by the template system, not stored in post_content

inserterRestriction.notes: block.json has supports.inserter: false. Block will not appear in the block inserter search. This is the standard mechanism for template-only blocks.

dualLocationControls.notes: Both TestimonialCPT.tsx (block body) and testimonial-cpt-panel.tsx (sidebar panel) read meta via useSelect(coreEditorStore).getEditedPostAttribute('meta') and write via useDispatch(coreEditorStore).editPost({ meta: {...} }). Since both read/write the same WordPress data store, they are always in sync.

autoTitleSync.notes: TestimonialCPT.tsx has useEffect that calls editPost({ title: meta.name }) when meta.name changes. This syncs the post title to the name field.

implementation.lintWarning: Missing 'editPost' dependency — minor issue, does not affect functionality

videoSourceToggle.notes: ToggleGroupControl with File/YouTube/Vimeo options. videoFile MediaUpload shown only when videoSource === 'file'. videoId TextControl shown only when videoSource === 'youtube' or 'vimeo'. Dynamic label ('YouTube Video ID' vs 'Vimeo Video ID') based on current videoSource value.

conditionalLogic.fileMode: Shows MediaUpload button; hides videoId TextControl
conditionalLogic.youtubeMode: Shows TextControl with label 'YouTube Video ID'; hides MediaUpload
conditionalLogic.vimeoMode: Shows TextControl with label 'Vimeo Video ID'; hides MediaUpload

tsxPhpSync.reason: CPT block has no PHP render file

frontendRendering.reason: CPT block is editor-only — no frontend URL

interactiveBehavior.reason: CPT block is editor-only — automated frontend interactive testing not applicable. Editor interactivity (conditional field display, toggle group) verified via code review.

accessibility.notes: All form controls use standard WordPress Gutenberg components (TextControl, TextareaControl, ToggleGroupControl, MediaUpload) which provide built-in accessibility (labels, ARIA attributes). Post type guard prevents rendering on wrong post types.
accessibility.reason: No block-type accessibility patterns defined for CPT blocks (no frontend render)

markupDuplication.notes: No markup duplication. Block body (TestimonialCPT.tsx) and sidebar panel (testimonial-cpt-panel.tsx) are intentionally separate files serving different UI locations. No hidden/shown duplicate DOM.

specChecklist.check: block.json has inserter: false, multiple: false, attributes: {}
Post type guard in both block and sidebar panel
All meta fields in both body and sidebar
Template lock added to post type registration
Sidebar panel import added to editor.js
All 5 meta fields registered with show_in_rest: true

designReferenceAlignment.notes: Card template uses all 5 meta fields. videoFile used as attachment ID for wp_get_attachment_url(). videoId used for YouTube embed URL and Vimeo embed URL. Both correctly match the editor implementation.

issues.description: useEffect missing 'editPost' in dependency array — triggers react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warning
issues.fix: Add editPost to the useEffect dependency array: useEffect(() => { ... }, [meta.name, editPost]);
issues.notes: editPost from useDispatch is referentially stable, so this won't cause extra re-renders. Fixing satisfies the lint rule.

passedChecks: block.json registration is correct (apiVersion 3, inserter: false, multiple: false, attributes: {})
No render field in block.json (correct for CPT block)
All file references exist (index.tsx, TestimonialCPT.tsx, TestimonialCPT.svg)
All 5 meta fields persist correctly via REST API (name, message, videoSource, videoFile, videoId)
Meta fields exposed in REST API response
Block pre-inserted via template on testimonial posts
Inserter restriction enforced via supports.inserter: false
Sidebar panel registered via PluginDocumentSettingPanel with all meta fields
Post type guard in both block body and sidebar panel
Dual-location controls: both body and sidebar read/write same meta store
Video source toggle conditional logic correct (file/youtube/vimeo)
Dynamic videoId label ('YouTube Video ID' vs 'Vimeo Video ID')
Design reference alignment: all fields in card-testimonial.php are implemented
